name: Kaye's Spinach Madeline
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spinach according to directions on package.
2. Drain and reserve liquid. Melt butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
3. Add flour, stirring until smooth and not browned.
4. Gradually add the reserved liquid, stirring constantly until thickened.
5. Stir in onion, cooking until softened but not browned.
6. Add remaining seasonings (black pepper, celery salt, garlic salt, Worcestershire sauce, and red pepper flakes) and shredded cheese to the spinach mixture.
7. Combine everything, stirring until the cheese is melted and well incorporated.
8. Serve with buttered bread crumbs on top if desired.
